name: knowledge-base-template
description: A Codex plugin for maintaining a lightweight personal knowledge base with raw sources and reusable wiki pages.

interface.shortDescription: Turn raw materials into a source-linked personal wiki.
interface.longDescription: Knowledge Base Template helps Codex preserve raw materials, update reusable wiki pages, answer from the knowledge base, and validate the vault structure.
defaultPrompt: 把这份资料加入知识库，并更新 wiki。
基于这个知识库回答我的问题。
检查知识库结构并修复可自动修复的问题。
